hero.title: Operator Deck, on a single surface.
hero.description: A living library that verifies every decision, signal, and product state keeps the same hierarchy before reaching the register.

commit.title: Commitment
commit.copy: Deep blue for actions that change the operation.

command.title: Command
command.copy: Amber for shortcuts, guidance, and assisted decisions.

signal.title: Signal
signal.copy: Mint for activity, selection, and availability.

controls.title: Controls with operational weight
controls.description: Controls feel like console keys: firm hierarchy, clear states, and immediate response.

form.switchCopy: Shows the next step without interrupting the flow.

signals.title: Signals that explain, not decorate
signals.description: Every color responds to an operational condition and always includes enough text to understand it.

success.title: Register synchronized.
success.copy: The latest 18 movements are already backed up.

warning.title: Review pending.
warning.copy: Two receipts need their payment method confirmed.

danger.title: Connection interrupted.
danger.copy: The site is preserving sales and will retry automatically.

data.title: Dense data, calm reading
data.description: The table, search, and secondary states share the same geometry while preserving visible focus.

empty.title: No matches found
empty.copy: Adjust the search or scan a different code.

error.title: We couldn't update the stations
error.copy: The previous information remains available while we recover the connection.

loading.title: Predictable waiting
loading.description: Skeletons preserve the content shape while accessibility contracts remain visible.

contract.title: Designed for continuous operation
contract.copy: The visual grammar is validated as a product, not as an isolated collection of styles.

adoption.title: One grammar, across the operation
adoption.description: The foundation is no longer an isolated sample: actions, states, and surfaces share typed contracts throughout operational flows.

actions.title: Actions
actions.copy: Consistent hierarchy for committing, guiding, approving, and voiding.

signals.title: Signals
signals.copy: Compact states and operational notices with shared semantics.

surfaces.title: Surfaces
surfaces.copy: Tables, forms, overlays, and empty states preserve rhythm and focus.

contract.title: Consistency is now verifiable.
contract.copy: The adoption gate prevents parallel button or status recipes from returning to product screens.

adaptability.title: Adaptability for the full shift
adaptability.description: The console preserves hierarchy and access when the operator enlarges content, reduces motion, or uses system colors.

zoom.title: 200% equivalent layout
zoom.copy: Checkout remains readable and the close, summary, and confirmation controls stay reachable.

motion.title: Reduced motion
motion.copy: Transitions yield to immediate state changes without removing orientation or focus.

contrast.title: Forced contrast
contrast.copy: Controls, surfaces, and focus rings use Windows high-contrast roles instead of decorative color.

contract.title: Adaptive contract active.
contract.copy: Critical sales controls remain visible without depending on animation, custom color, or a wide viewport.

scale.title: Scale without operational noise
scale.description: The interface keeps its speed, orientation, and useful density when the catalog stops being a demo and starts resembling a real store.
scale.note: The production table runs against the product's shared budget

dataset.label: Active dataset
dataset.copy: Deterministic references on the same surface

window.label: Render window
window.copy: The DOM stays bounded while the full context remains available

search.label: Findability
search.copy: Finding and traversing data does not require a mode change

contract.title: Bounded window, complete context.
contract.copy: Virtualization limits visual work without hiding totals, search, or keyboard navigation.

journeys.title: Critical journeys, one operating promise
journeys.description: The flows that sustain a shift no longer live as isolated tests: they share a visible matrix of roles, continuity, language, and interaction.
journeys.note: Every row retains exact Playwright evidence

contract.title: Every shift experience has an owner and evidence.
contract.copy: The contract links each journey to its real test and fails when the flow disappears, changes name, or loses a declared operating variant.

operational.title: Performance that protects continuity
operational.description: Speed stops being an impression: import, backup, launch, and critical queued work now share explicit and enforceable limits.
operational.note: Conservative budgets with bounded runner tolerance

launch.copy: Includes the embedded server, window, and operating renderer.

queue.copy: Excess work is rejected explicitly; it never grows silently.

contract.title: Volume no longer depends on a fast machine.
contract.copy: Server and desktop apply the same limits with at most {{threshold}}% tolerance for runner variation.

modal.title: Confirm register opening
modal.copy: This example uses the real product modal to verify hierarchy, focus, and actions in a high-commitment context.

drawer.title: Role inspector
drawer.copy: The drawer keeps the primary surface visible while presenting secondary context and supporting actions.
